title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
synopsis: When Megatron and his Predacons target Earth to seize powerful Cybertronian artifacts, Optimus Prime's Autobots go undercover among human society as everyday vehicles. Allying with a boy named Koji whose scientist father has been kidnapped, the Autobots battle both the Predacons and the newly created Decepticons, culminating in a struggle over the colossal battle station Fortress Maximus.

episodes.title: Battle Protocol!
episodes.synopsis: Optimus Prime and the Autobots arrive on Earth to stop Megatron's Predacons from stealing a powerful energy source, forming an alliance with a young boy named Koji.

episodes.title: An Explosive Situation
episodes.synopsis: The Predacons target a dam to harvest its energy, and the Autobots must stop them before the resulting explosion devastates the surrounding area.

episodes.title: Bullet Train to the Rescue
episodes.synopsis: The Autobot Team Bullet Train — Railspike, Rapid Run, and Midnight Express — arrive on Earth to reinforce the Autobots against the Predacon threat.

episodes.title: Spychangers to the Rescue
episodes.synopsis: A team of elite Autobot spies called the Spychangers joins the fight on Earth, using their stealth abilities to counter the Predacons.

episodes.title: The Hunt for Black Pyramid
episodes.synopsis: The Autobots search for a mysterious ancient artifact known as the Black Pyramid before Megatron can claim its power for himself.

episodes.title: The Secret of the Ruins
episodes.synopsis: Ancient ruins hold clues to powerful Cybertronian relics, and both factions race to uncover their secrets before the other.

episodes.title: Sideburn's Obsession
episodes.synopsis: Side Burn's obsessive pursuit of red sports cars becomes a liability when the Predacons exploit his distraction to launch an attack.

episodes.title: Secret Weapon: D-5
episodes.synopsis: Megatron unveils a dangerous secret weapon designated D-5, forcing the Autobots to find a way to neutralize the new threat.

episodes.title: Mirage's Betrayal
episodes.synopsis: A Spychanger named Mirage appears to betray the Autobots, but his true loyalties may be part of a deeper plan.

episodes.title: Skid Z's Choice
episodes.synopsis: Autobot Skid-Z must choose between his love of racing and his duty to fight alongside his teammates against the Predacons.

episodes.title: Tow-Line Goes Haywire
episodes.synopsis: Autobot Tow-Line's obsession with enforcing parking rules spirals out of control, creating chaos that the Predacons try to exploit.

episodes.title: The Ultimate Robot Warrior
episodes.synopsis: Megatron seeks to create the ultimate warrior by combining the powers of multiple Predacons, forcing the Autobots into a desperate battle.

episodes.title: Hope for the Future
episodes.synopsis: Koji's determination to rescue his father inspires the Autobots as they face mounting pressure from Megatron's forces.

episodes.title: The Decepticons
episodes.synopsis: Megatron creates a team of Decepticons from stolen Autobot protoforms, led by the sinister Scourge — a dark mirror of Optimus Prime.

episodes.title: Commandos
episodes.synopsis: The newly formed Decepticon Commandos prove to be formidable opponents, pushing the Autobots to their limits.

episodes.title: Volcano
episodes.synopsis: A volcanic eruption threatens a populated area while the Autobots and Predacons clash near the unstable site.

episodes.title: Attack from Outer Space
episodes.synopsis: An extraterrestrial threat complicates the ongoing war between the Autobots and Predacons on Earth.

episodes.title: The Test
episodes.synopsis: Optimus Prime tests his warriors' resolve and combat readiness as the conflict with Megatron intensifies.

episodes.title: The Fish Test
episodes.synopsis: Sky-Byte attempts to prove his worth to Megatron by capturing an Autobot, leading to a comically bungled scheme.

episodes.title: Wedge's Short Fuse
episodes.synopsis: Build Team leader Wedge's temper puts the team at risk during a critical mission against the Decepticons.

episodes.title: Landfill
episodes.synopsis: The Build Team combines into the mighty Landfill to battle the Decepticons in a show of combined Autobot power.

episodes.title: Sky-Byte Saves the Day
episodes.synopsis: In an ironic twist, the bumbling Predacon Sky-Byte inadvertently helps the Autobots thwart one of Megatron's plans.

episodes.title: A Test of Metal
episodes.synopsis: The Autobots face a grueling challenge that tests both their physical strength and their loyalty to one another.

episodes.title: Ultra Magnus
episodes.synopsis: Optimus Prime's estranged brother Ultra Magnus arrives on Earth, harboring a grudge and demanding the Matrix of Leadership.

episodes.title: Ultra Magnus: Forced Fusion!
episodes.synopsis: Ultra Magnus forcibly combines with Optimus Prime, creating an unstable fusion as the brothers struggle for control.

episodes.title: Lessons of the Past
episodes.synopsis: Flashbacks reveal the history between Optimus Prime and Ultra Magnus, shedding light on their rivalry and shared past.

episodes.title: The Two Faces of Ultra Magnus
episodes.synopsis: Ultra Magnus must decide where his true loyalties lie as Megatron attempts to manipulate him against the Autobots.

episodes.title: Power to Burn!
episodes.synopsis: A new source of immense power is discovered, and both factions race to claim it before the other can harness its energy.

episodes.title: Fortress Maximus
episodes.synopsis: The legendary Autobot battle station Fortress Maximus is discovered hidden on Earth, and Megatron will stop at nothing to seize it.

episodes.title: Koji Gets His Wish
episodes.synopsis: Koji's deepest wish to save his father drives him into danger as the battle over Fortress Maximus intensifies.

episodes.title: A Friendly Contest
episodes.synopsis: A seemingly friendly competition between Autobots takes a serious turn when the Predacons use it as cover for an ambush.

episodes.title: Peril from the Past
episodes.synopsis: Ancient dangers from Cybertron's past resurface on Earth, threatening both the Autobots and the Predacons.

episodes.title: Maximus Emerges
episodes.synopsis: Fortress Maximus fully awakens, and the Autobots must learn to control its awesome power before Megatron can steal it.

episodes.title: The Human Element
episodes.synopsis: The bond between humans and Autobots is tested as Koji and his friends prove that human courage can make a difference in the war.

episodes.title: Mystery of the Ultra Magnus
episodes.synopsis: New revelations about Ultra Magnus emerge as he confronts his past and reconciles with Optimus Prime.

episodes.title: Mistaken Identity
episodes.synopsis: A case of mistaken identity causes chaos as the Autobots struggle to tell friend from foe during a Decepticon deception.

episodes.title: Surprise Attack!
episodes.synopsis: Megatron launches a devastating surprise assault on the Autobots, pushing them to the brink of defeat.

episodes.title: Galvatron's Revenge
episodes.synopsis: Megatron evolves into the more powerful Galvatron and unleashes his fury on both the Autobots and his own treacherous subordinates.

episodes.title: The Final Battle
episodes.synopsis: Optimus Prime and Galvatron clash in an epic final showdown that determines the fate of Earth and the future of both factions.

facts: Originally aired in Japan as 'Transformers: Car Robots' in 2000 before being dubbed into English by Saban Entertainment for the Fox Kids block.
It was the first official English dub of a Japanese-original Transformers anime to air in North America.
Voice recording was done in Los Angeles, making it the only Transformers show from 1996-2006 not recorded in Vancouver.
Multiple episodes were re-edited or pulled from US broadcast after the September 11 attacks due to scenes depicting collapsing buildings.
Sky-Byte became a breakout fan-favorite character, winning the 2023 Transformers Hall of Fame fan vote over two decades after the show aired.
Disney acquired the series when purchasing Saban's assets in 2001, making it the only American-broadcast Transformers cartoon never fully released on DVD in the United States.
